# @rzv/make-brand
> Minimal brand toolkit for Zod. Turns a Zod schema into a type-safe toolkit for creating, validating, comparing, and composing branded (nominal) types. Prevents accidental mixing of structurally similar types like UserId and OrderId.

`zod ^4.3.6` is a peer dependency. The package is ESM-only.

## Documentation
- [Full API reference and examples](./llms-full.txt): Complete documentation for LLM consumption — all methods, types, patterns, and error handling
- [README](./README.md): Human-readable documentation with installation, quick start, and usage examples

## Source
- [makeBrand implementation](./src/make-brand.ts): Core function that creates a BrandKit from a Zod schema
- [Type definitions](./src/types.ts): BrandKit, BrandSymbol, BrandedType, BrandedSchema, BrandCombineFn types
- [Test suite](./tests/index.test.ts): Comprehensive tests for all methods

## Optional
- [LLM Guide](./LLM-GUIDE.md): Standalone reference file optimized for LLM context windows
